message:
refactor: consolidate redundant cycle logic into shared cycleInGroup handler (gt-lvw20)

Extract shared sort-find-wrap-switch logic from cycleTownSession,
cycleRigInfraSession, cycleCrewSession, and cyclePolecatSession into
a single cycleInGroup function. Also add resolveCurrentSession helper
and consolidate tmux session listing to use listTmuxSessions everywhere.

Net reduction of ~160 lines across 5 files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
